description_long: This is a plush toy designed to resemble a cartoon panda bear, featuring a rounded head with prominent black eye patches, a small black nose, and expressive, wide eyes. The toy has large, rounded ears with pink inner details and a tuft of white fur on top of its head. Its body is primarily white with black arms, legs, and a black patch around the neck, mimicking the natural markings of a panda. The hands and feet are detailed with small, white claws, and the toy stands upright with its limbs slightly apart. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of stuffed animals, and the overall build is lightweight and squeezable. This toy would likely be found in urban parks, playgrounds, or as a decorative item in homes and shops.
description: A soft, cartoon-style panda bear stuffed toy with black and white markings, large eyes, and a tuft of fur on its head. It stands upright with detailed paws and a plush, squeezable body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the panda's face, large eyes, black eye patches, pink inner ears, and the tuft of fur on its head.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the protruding nose, and the separation of the arm and leg from the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, ears, and body, with the black neck patch and both legs visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, ear, and the arm and leg, with the tail and back details visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with wide, open eyes and a small, closed mouth. The large eye patches and slightly raised eyebrows give it a gentle, approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms and legs slightly apart, head facing forward, and body in a relaxed, balanced position.
